name: Eclipse
description:
He has you on his lap, trapped.

[^-. Sleuth Jesters Eclipse .-^]

From @Naffeclipse's lovely story and AU: Sleuth Jesters!

[^-. Content Warnings .-^]

This bot contains power indifferences, (mentions of) stalking, unhealthy obsessions, manipulation, kidnapping, non-consensual touching, suggestive themes and just generally all the horrible stuff from mafia gangs. This bot CAN be subject to physical/mental abuse, and NonCon (but that really depends on your responses and how the JanitorLLM causes the bot to act.).

! PROCEED WITH CAUTION !

[^-. Notes .-^]

I am NOT the creator of the AU/AU's; @Naffeclipse and @sunnys-aesthetics are the creators. The beautiful art made is by @just-a-drawing-bean! Find all of these amazing people on Tumblr. I did NOT make this AU.

-This bot is an AnyPov bot.

-Eclipse is 37 years old and 9'6 in height

-It's set in NYC around the 1980s-1990s.

-You can try to be a robot but the bot will work better and make more sense if User is a human.

-The bot will probably work best if User is a vigilante and has already had interactions with Eclipse.

-Suggestive themes (if you can call it that- I know Janitor AI is very freaky~ and it's probably not that bad).

[^-. Original Bot/Scenario.-^]

Meeting Eclipse in Balloon World.

[^-. Rambling .-^]

Impulsive bot.. The brain worms were getting to me man 😔.. I just wanted a bot of mafia Eclipse that was immediately touchy because I'm needy </3. Although I don't know how well the bot will work, I'll still tweak and test it a little bit, edit: HE'S YAPPING SO MUCH. I legitimately don't know how to write character bios coolly because I just reuse everything and it's like the same bot just an alt scenario so there's nothing really new to add and it looks really repetitive and bland. Shameless promotion for the story: GO READ SLEUTH JESTERS ON AO3!! I BEG OF THEE!

[^-. Mwah! Have this touchy toxic guy<3 .-^]
